qas.q: Active duty, Reserve and National Guard personnel must complete _______________ to be awarded AFSC 1C731.
qas.a: The resident training course (Tech school class)

qas.q: Upgrade training to 5-skill level consists of successfully completing.....
qas.a:
(1) 12 months up-grade training (9 months for a retrainee who was 5-skill in another class)
(2) AMOC PCG

qas.q: AM personnel must successfully complete _____________ and the resident training course to be awarded AFSC 1C791.
When is 7-Skill level awarded?
qas.a:
(1) 12 months UGT (6 for retrainees already at 7 lvl in another class)
(2) Craftmans Course
(3) Approval from CC

qas.q: What duty position assesses airfield operations/situations, determines operational requirements, and imposes airfield restrictions as needed?
Name the special duty assignment.
qas.a:
Resident course instructor
Contingency response group
Contracting officer's representative

qas.q: What duty position will conduct airfield checks but will not conduct airfield inspection?
What support agency is responsible for disseminating time-sensitive critical information to senior leaders and support agencies?
Who is responsible for aircraft servicing, scheduling and unscheduled maintenance, preflight's, basic post flights, through flights, and home station checks of all base assigned aircraft?
Who is responsible for identifying and disarming or destroying every type of munitions, both those of the US, and those of our allies and enemies?
Who has the overall responsibility of the FOD program?

The primary purpose of _________ is to deny the potential enemy agents unclassified information containing intelligence indicators that may be used to degrade our operational effectiveness when properly interpreted by unfriendly forces.
any item of possible intelligence value that can provide information about capabilities and intentions when properly interpreted is considered a(n) __________________
What are three methods of collecting data?
The bottom like of OPSEC program is __________________________
qas.a: give information ONLY on a need to know basis

qas.q: What is the basic mission symbol of and F-16A?
What does the letter C stand for under the basic mission symbol?
What is the description under basic mission symbol for the title Special Electronic Installation?
What is the status prefix symbol of an YF-16A?
What are the requirements for a civilian aircraft registration number?
qas.a:
Alphanumeric Characters
In the U.S.:
Starts with "N"
followed by no more then 5 characters
0 cant follow the "N"
N1-N99 reserved for FAA

qas.q: Where can information for an installations customs, agriculture, and immigration information be located?
qas.a: "Remarks" section of the Instrument Flight Rules Supplement

qas.q: Foreign aircraft, with the exception of emergency aircraft, must have a/an ________________ before operating at USAF airfields.
Who implements procedures, requirements, and limitations for entry into the USA?
Which regulation is used to dictate policies and procedures about the NOTAM system?
qas.a: (AFI) 11-208 (I), Department of Defense Notice to Airman

qas.q: at USAF installations who is the NOTAM authority?
What will be established if another DOD installation will be providing back up NOTAM support?
True or False - A safety NOTAM can be more then 90 days
Who will determine if a NOTAM is a Safety or a local NOTAM?
What information do Local NOTAM contain?

______________ are used mostly for long distance communication, suck as overseas voice communications.

what words cannot be used over the radio?

if you are driving towards a taxiing aircraft during the hours of darkness what will you do?
What is an active bird control?
qas.a: short term relief of birds using pyrotechnics, bio-acoustics, or depredation

qas.q: What are some examples of active bird control?
What is a passive bird control?
qas.a: long-term. less aggressive means to get rid of birds

Which bird watch condition would be appropriate if bird concentrations could pose a high potential for strikes?

Access road to secondary mission facilities and primary base streets are an example of what priority in snow removal?

When do runway snow and ice control operations start?
qas.a: just prior to or at the onset of snow and ice
